issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in pre-referral and post-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were generating duplicate tasks across the pre-referral and post-referral workflows. The issue was caused by a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and confirmed the fix.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or delete the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs continued receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks after deals were marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow lacked proper unenrollment filters for these deal stages. A filter tweak was applied on March 9th to resolve the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually complete or dismiss any stale check-in tasks that were generated for deals already marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: LO name not updating in automated emails after loan officer reassignment
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails continued to display the previous LO's name instead of the newly assigned one. The issue was identified as a product-level problem and was resolved by Luis. The affected deal was showing Paul instead of Julie Yocum as the LO.
issues.workaround: For any leads that received automated emails with the incorrect LO name during the impact window, manually send a corrected email with the updated LO information.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-enrolling deals that flip back to Offer Accepted after termination
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, then back to Referred Active or Committed due to a fallen contract, and then back to Offer Accepted again, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was missing from the re-enrollment criteria in the workflow. The re-enrollment criteria was updated to include this trigger.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were flipped back to Offer Accepted during the impact window and did not receive TC tasks.

issues.title: MRC deals marked Offer Accepted not enrolling into TC workflow
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering enrollment into the TC workflow, meaning TCs were not receiving their tasks. HubSpot support was consulted and a fix was applied. Most MRC deals never have a loan officer assigned, which was investigated as a potential contributing factor but was ultimately resolved through HubSpot support.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals that were moved to Offer Accepted during the impact window and did not receive TC tasks.
